name: multi-model-team
description: Delegates token-heavy, self-contained tasks to a local pre-authed agy (Gemini) CLI, choosing backend/model by task size and type, with credit-exhaustion fallback to native Claude and a glanceable statusline HUD. /team runs a decompose → dispatch (parallel agy + native) → verify → fix → synthesize pipeline with per-backend caps, dependency ordering, and an Ultracode dynamic-workflow path.
